text:
Created attachment 191590
lang/gcc6 build log

I'm building some of the ports via Poudriere and unfortunately, lang/gcc6 fails every single time on exactly the same line.

From the error it is not clear to me why the build fails and a quick search in Bugzilla and Google yielded no results.

I attached the Poudriere error log for troubleshooting.
